positive: A minimalist, stylized portrait of a majestic, glowing mountain range silhouette at dawn. The mountains are rendered with clean, bold lines and deep saturated colors (indigo, violet, teal) contrasted sharply against a gradient sky that transitions from soft peach to brilliant gold. Integrate subtle, ethereal elements like stylized clouds and floating geometry to suggest magic and vastness. The style should be a fusion of sophisticated modern vector art and graphic illustration, suitable for screen printing. Composition must be central and balanced, with the mountain range occupying the middle third. High contrast, smooth gradients, clean edges, flat graphic quality, printable, high resolution.
